# Vits Consulting

> Technology consulting for non-technical founders. From idea to working product.

## About

Thomas Vits is a technologist with 20+ years of experience across telecom, edge computing, and AI. He helps non-technical founders validate concepts and build first versions — strategy, architecture, and hands-on execution.

Based in the Dusseldorf/Cologne region, Germany. Working with clients across Europe.

## Services

- **Feasibility & Strategy**: Assess technical viability, build requirements, go-to-market planning for emerging tech (AI, edge, spatial computing)
- **Build**: Architecture design and hands-on development of prototypes, MVPs, or production v1
- **Technical Sparring**: Architecture reviews, technology choices, build-or-buy decisions for technical founders
- **Due Diligence**: Technical assessment for investors or corporate ventures

## Experience

Clients include Infercom, Deutsche Telekom, MobiledgeX, Proxy42, Open Sesame Media, and Move2Edge.

Co-founded TangibleXR (spatial computing) and EdgeXR (edge cloud platform).
